# Toronto Basement Underpinning - Toronto

> Toronto Basement Underpinning is a General Contractor in Toronto, Ontario, Canada, providing basement underpinning, lowering, interior waterproofing, sump pump installation, basement finishing, concrete foundation repair, and plumbing and drain services. Established in 2006, the company holds Fully Licensed General Contractor and Fully Insured credentials and operates 20 dedicated crews across the Greater Toronto Area. The company serves homeowners in Toronto seeking to increase livable space, real estate investors creating basement rental apartments, and families needing higher ceilings for structural comfort.

- Phone: (416) 900-4982
- Email: info@torontobasementunderpinning.ca
- Address: Toronto, Ontario, Canada
- Hours: Monday – Friday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM; Saturday: 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM; Sunday: Closed
- License: Fully Licensed General Contractor, Fully Insured
- Established: 2006

## Services

- [Basement Underpinning & Lowering](https://torontobasementunderpinning.ca/basement-underpinning/): Deep excavation and installation of new concrete footings to extend foundation walls, safely increasing basement ceiling heights to 8 feet or higher.
- [Interior Waterproofing](https://torontobasementunderpinning.ca/interior-waterproofing/): Complete interior waterproofing of all foundation walls to prevent flood and water damage.
- [Basement Finishing](https://torontobasementunderpinning.ca/basement-finishing/): Comprehensive remodeling after underpinning, creating new layouts and completely finishing the newly lowered space.
- [Sump Pumps & Battery Backups](https://torontobasementunderpinning.ca/sump-pumps/): Installation of robust sump pumps and backup systems to actively manage basement water accumulation.
- [Concrete & Foundation Repair](https://torontobasementunderpinning.ca/concrete-foundation-repair/): Foundational concrete repairs to support a dry and structurally sound home.
- [Drawings & Permits](https://torontobasementunderpinning.ca/drawings-permits/): Coordination with architects to provide proper structural drawings and secure necessary city permits.
- [Plumbing & Drains](https://torontobasementunderpinning.ca/plumbing-drain-services/): General underground plumbing, drain maintenance, and drain services.

## Areas Served

Toronto, North York, Scarborough, Etobicoke, York, East York, Mississauga, Brampton, Caledon, Markham, Vaughan, Richmond Hill, Newmarket, Aurora, Oakville, Burlington, Milton, Halton Hills, Pickering, Ajax, Whitby, Oshawa
